memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-05 Afternoon

**Jobs report shock can rapidly change all 3 low-conviction sub-scores:** May non-farm payrolls +172K (2× expected) caused macro score to collapse from 5/10 to 3/10 and sentiment from 7/10 to 4/10 across all tech/semiconductor names in one session. This brought all previously-approved watchlist entries (AMD 7.17, MU 7.67, PLTR 7.0) below 7.0 threshold. Lesson: macro binary events (major jobs reports, CPI, FOMC decisions) can temporarily suppress scores even when fundamental and tech-analyst theses remain intact.

**Re-scoring at current conditions supersedes prior approvals:** The 6-agent framework should always be run fresh at each routine. Conditions from one session do not automatically carry forward to the next. Prior approvals are commitments to act IF conditions remain similar — not unconditional orders.

**SK Hynix -10% is a leading indicator for MU:** As the primary global HBM competitor, SK Hynix's intraday performance is a real-time proxy for MU sentiment. A -10% SK Hynix session = anticipate MU -5%+ and elevated technical bearishness. Use this as a technical score modifier going forward.

**PLTR is the most defensible watchlist name in rate-hike environments:** Government AI contracts are budget-appropriated (not rate-sensitive). In a day where AMD fell -6.3% and MU fell -5.6%, PLTR fell only modestly (to $141, within its established range). This validates the thesis that PLTR has lower macro sensitivity than semiconductor names.

**GLD can outperform in simultaneous rate-hike-fear + risk-off environments:** Despite dollar strengthening from rate hike fears (normally a GLD headwind), GLD rose today (+$3.36/sh) as the safe-haven bid from general risk-off sentiment dominated. This confirms GLD as a valid macro-hedge even in some rate-rise scenarios.

- **DOMINANT: May Non-Farm Payrolls +172K** (vs +86K expected; 2× beat). Unemployment 4.3%. Rate hike probability surged under hawkish Warsh Fed.
- **10-year yield:** New multi-week high (since May 21). Direct multiple compression for high-growth tech.
- **FOMC June 16-17:** Rate hike probability meaningfully elevated by today's print. Next major binary event.
- **GLD:** $411.27. Safe-haven bid outweighs dollar strength today. Stop $397.92 safe (3.25% buffer).
- **AMD $490:** No AMD-specific negatives. Pure sector/macro contagion. Thesis intact.
- **MU $940:** SK Hynix -10% = direct peer amplifying HBM fear. HBM4 contracts are multi-year (not macro-sensitive). Thesis intact.
- **PLTR $141.51:** Most insulated from rate hike fears. Government defense AI thesis.
